sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Tho un! Tho un! Topa’n eite hong sam zo hi,
Ding un ding un, Um in Ama thute;
un! Pai un khia un Jubili kum hi,
Eite Topa Jesuh hong itna thuphate.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: I mai lam ah, lam hong hilh hong
A min, amin thang ki za tawntung hen la,
Jesuh Topa bek thei ni, Haleluijah

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Khuamial sung a si ding mite,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Huh un huh un, A cimawhte huh un.
Na khut khak un, Itna maitaina tawh hon in,
kepna tuu huang sungah hong tunpih un.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Khuadak khia un, Topa kamciam ni hong nai
Phat un phat un, A lian bel Kumpipa
